productDisplayName: Nike Women Sweet Classic White Pink Shoe
description: Composition:White and pink vulcanised sneaker with contrast color swoosh branding and herringbone structured outsoleshoe Care:1. Rub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThese shoes from nike have a really cool retro feel with the classic design and white colour. The pink swoosh corresponds to the pink sole with the herringbone pattern. The shoe gives excellent protection with the white uppers, while the vulcanised sole gives good grip. It's that perfect footwear for urban living.
